UHL Editorial garden lab Urban Harvest Lab Science-based guides for modern small-space growing.

Category

Hydroponics

Hydroponics rewards consistency. These guides focus on simple, stable setups, how to avoid nutrient mistakes, and how to read what your plants are telling you before problems escalate.

Primary topic hub

Hydroponics

Hydroponics rewards consistency more than complexity. This hub organizes beginner system choices, nutrient management, troubleshooting, and advanced indoor-growing decisions around stable, repeatable small-space setups.

Open topic hub Browse archive
Featured in this category

Start with the strongest entry points.

Hydroponics March 1, 2026

Hydroponic Nutrients for Beginners: EC and pH Without the Confusion

Most hydroponic problems are not mysterious. They come from concentration drift, pH drift, heat, or neglected maintenance. This guide covers the basics clearly.

Urban Harvest Lab Editorial Read guide
Topic pathways

Structured routes from the primary hub

Topic pathway

Beginner guides

Start with manageable herb and leafy-green systems before trying to optimize every variable.

Hydroponics February 18, 2026

Countertop Hydroponic Herbs for Beginners: What to Buy and What to Ignore

Countertop hydroponic systems can work very well for herbs, but only if you treat them as small growing systems rather than decorative appliances.

Urban Harvest Lab Editorial Read guide

Topic pathway

Setup guides

These guides connect hydroponic systems to lighting, fixture choice, and indoor layout decisions.

Grow Lights February 22, 2026

How Many Hours Should Grow Lights Run for Herbs?

A longer light schedule is not always a better one. Herbs need enough daily light, but they also benefit from a stable dark period and realistic fixture placement.

Urban Harvest Lab Editorial Read guide
Grow Lights March 7, 2026

Best Grow Lights for Herbs: What Actually Matters Before You Buy

The best grow light for herbs is the one that matches your footprint, crop density, and tolerance for heat and visual clutter. This guide focuses on fit before hype.

Urban Harvest Lab Editorial Read guide
Topic pathway

Troubleshooting

Use these diagnosis-led guides when herbs or lettuce stop performing the way the system should allow.

Hydroponics March 6, 2026

Hydroponic Lettuce Growing Slowly? How to Diagnose the Real Bottleneck

Slow hydroponic lettuce is usually a systems problem, not a mystery deficiency. The goal is to find the bottleneck without overcorrecting five variables at once.

Urban Harvest Lab Editorial Read guide
Plant Problems March 5, 2026

Why Are Basil Leaves Turning Yellow Indoors?

Yellow basil rarely has a single universal cause. The pattern of yellowing, the growing medium, and the recent care routine usually tell the story.

Urban Harvest Lab Editorial Read guide
Topic pathway

Advanced topics

Once the fundamentals are stable, use these pieces to tighten plant density, fixture choice, and crop quality.

Grow Lights January 16, 2026

Grow Light Distance for Seedlings: How Close Is Too Close?

Seedlings usually need grow lights much closer than beginners expect, but the exact distance depends on fixture strength, lens design, and plant response.

Urban Harvest Lab Editorial Read guide
Grow Lights February 22, 2026

How Many Hours Should Grow Lights Run for Herbs?

A longer light schedule is not always a better one. Herbs need enough daily light, but they also benefit from a stable dark period and realistic fixture placement.
